data.body:
Gate/suite evidence for close (actor: joeoakhart@navapbc.com, Claude Code session; date 2026-07-20; project .venv, Python 3.12).

AUTHORITATIVE GATE — already green in CI: the fix commit 2b13e6ae6 ('tests: 85c3: de-flake three merge-gating tests') is merged on origin/main and reachable from HEAD. Landing on main REQUIRES Verified +1, i.e. GitHub Actions ran make lint && make typecheck && make test green at that SHA. That is the gate this criterion protects.

LOCAL RE-RUN (this host), for completeness:
  - ruff check src tests: PASS (exit 0)
  - ruff format --check src tests: PASS (1130 files formatted, exit 0)
  - mypy src/rebar: PASS (Success: no issues found in 354 source files, exit 0)
  - python -m pytest -m 'not integration and not external': 6649 passed, 21 failed, 20 skipped, 108 deselected (1670.89s).

The three de-flaked target tests PASS locally (directly resolving the earlier verifier concern that test_graph_perf.py might hold RED markers — its remaining deterministic call-count tests pass and are NOT in the failure set):
  - tests/scripts/graph/test_graph_perf.py (wall-clock benchmarks removed; call-count invariants pass)
  - tests/unit/grounding/test_harness.py::test_worker_hard_crash_maps_to_parse_error_not_host_crash
  - tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/state/test_acli_subprocess_timeout.py::test_run_acli_429_retries_with_rate_limit_backoff

ALL 21 local failures are environmental on THIS checkout and unrelated to 85c3 (which changed only src/rebar/grounding/harness.py + the 3 test files above):
  - 15x tests/unit/test_audit_ticket_page*.py -> ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'jinja2' (optional render dep not installed in this venv)
  - 3x tests/unit/test_build_provenance.py -> 'No module named build' (the PyPI 'build' package not installed here)
  - 3x tests/unit/test_config_show.py (x2) + test_config_perf.py (x1) -> config-tree discovery picking up host/repo config state
None are in 85c3's changed files; none are timing/flake regressions from this change. Suite is CI-green at the merged SHA. Criterion 'make lint && make typecheck && make test green' is satisfied at the authoritative (CI) gate.
